events.agenda: Inaugural Denver dbt Meetup covering Nasdaq's move to the modern data stack with dbt Cloud and the dbt Mesh features in dbt Core 1.5.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt.
events.raw_text:
Wed, Apr 26, 2023 · 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM MDT

Fivetran, 1401 Zuni St, Denver, CO

Denver dbt Meetup #1

Presentation #1: Nasdaq's Route to the Modern Data Stack. How dbt Cloud enabled Nasdaq to create new business opportunities through collaborative analytics. Speaker: Michael Weiss, Sr. Product Manager, Nasdaq.

Presentation #2: When and how to use the "dbt Mesh" features included in dbt Core 1.5. Speaker: Doug Beatty, Sr. Developer Experience Advocate, dbt Labs.

talks.description: How dbt Cloud enabled Nasdaq to create new business opportunities through collaborative analytics on the modern data stack.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Presentation #1: Nasdaq's Route to the Modern Data Stack. How dbt Cloud enabled Nasdaq to create new business opportunities through collaborative analytics. Speaker: Michael Weiss, Sr. Product Manager, Nasdaq
talks.title: Nasdaq's Route to the Modern Data Stack

talks.description: When and how to use the dbt Mesh features introduced in dbt Core 1.5.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Presentation #2: When and how to use the "dbt Mesh" features included in dbt Core 1.5. Speaker: Doug Beatty, Sr. Developer Experience Advocate, dbt Labs

Canceled

Mon, Jun 23, 2025 · 5:30 PM to 8:00 PM MDT

Slalom, Denver, CO

dbt Global Circuit: Denver

Presentation: "For Builders, by Builders: The Latest Tools from dbt Labs" by Matt Winkler (Principal Solutions Architect @ dbt Labs) and Doug Beatty (Developer Experience Advocate Lead @ dbt Labs)

Comment from host: We will reschedule for later in the year! We are looking to welcome a larger crowd later.
